project.title: sigue
project.one_liner: Laravel 6 education platform for student enrollment, learning content, assessments, messaging, and payment operations.
project.description: This repository contains a Laravel 6 monolith with Blade views, a large API surface, generated API documentation, and Vue-based chat components. Student-facing views reference the Entrenator brand, while the tracked routes and controllers cover academic content, assessments, messaging, and collections workflows.

prerequisites: A database supported by Laravel 6; config/database.php defaults to MySQL
A frontend host configured for URL_QUASAR redirects if you need the login or student panel routes
setup_steps: This repository does not include a tracked .env.example or a documented one-command local setup.
Detected frontend asset commands: npm run dev, npm run watch, npm run hot, npm run prod.
Detected operational Artisan commands: php artisan santander:process, php artisan colegiatura:cobrar, php artisan send:access.
Review routes/web.php before local web setup because login and panel routes redirect to URL_QUASAR.

cv_bullets.bullet: Built and maintained a Laravel 6 monolith that combines web routes, Blade views, and a large REST-like API for academic and operations workflows.
cv_bullets.notes: Explicit in framework metadata, route files, and tracked Blade views.

cv_bullets.bullet: Implemented student onboarding and enrollment flows with requests, custom registration fields, package assignment, groups, grades, scholarships, and notifications.
cv_bullets.notes: Route and controller names explicitly describe these flows.

cv_bullets.bullet: Built content-management modules for subjects, topics, videos, documents, resources, glossary terms, and lesson-planning imports.
cv_bullets.notes: The tracked API modules cover both academic content and planning imports.

cv_bullets.bullet: Delivered assessment and progress-tracking workflows covering question banks, exam generation, answer capture, grading, attendance, notes, and topic completion.
cv_bullets.notes: Endpoints and controller names are explicit.

cv_bullets.bullet: Implemented real-time chat with Laravel broadcasting, Echo/Pusher, private channels, and Vue components.
cv_bullets.notes: Broadcast events, channel wiring, and Vue listeners are all tracked in the repository.

cv_bullets.bullet: Integrated multi-provider payment and collections workflows spanning Mercado Pago, Conekta, PayPal, BBVA, and Santander reference/file processing.
cv_bullets.notes: The route layer, controllers, and payment-support classes explicitly name these providers.

cv_bullets.bullet: Added operational Artisan commands for tuition charging, Santander file ingestion, and bulk access-reset emails.
cv_bullets.notes: Command signatures and descriptions are explicit in tracked code.

cv_bullets.bullet: Supported bulk spreadsheet imports for students, groups, users, and planning data with Laravel Excel.
cv_bullets.notes: Import classes and controller calls to Excel::import are tracked.

cv_bullets.bullet: Set up token-based API authentication with Laravel Passport and social login support with Socialite.
cv_bullets.notes: Dependencies, provider bootstrapping, and auth routes are explicit.

cv_bullets.bullet: Maintained generated API reference material with LaRecipe and Swagger-style pages under resources/docs/1.0.
cv_bullets.notes: Tracked documentation files and dependencies confirm the docs stack.

red_flags.issue: Potential hardcoded third-party credentials are present in tracked source files.
red_flags.notes: Do not expose the values publicly; rotate them and move them to environment configuration before reuse.

red_flags.issue: Runtime logs and archive artifacts are present in the working tree under the generated API docs tree.
red_flags.notes: git status --porcelain marked these files as untracked during validation; they are not suitable for public portfolio output.

red_flags.issue: Local setup is not self-contained in this snapshot.
red_flags.notes: No tracked .env.example or Docker assets were found, and login or panel routes depend on URL_QUASAR.

red_flags.issue: PHPUnit is configured, but the referenced bootstrap and suite directories are missing from this checkout.
red_flags.notes: phpunit.xml references tests/bootstrap.php, tests/Unit, and tests/Feature, but those paths are absent.

red_flags.issue: The working tree already contains unrelated modified application files.
red_flags.notes: Detected via git status --porcelain during final validation; these files were not edited as part of this documentation task.
